LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Helmet.description: Part of the army uniform, this helmet offers a little protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Army_Helmet.label: Army Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Assault_Gas_Mask.description: An armored gasmask worn underneath a cloth hood. It provides decent protection against bullets and hazardous gases and similar substances and is most often worn by raiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Assault_Gas_Mask.label: Assault Gasmask
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Helmet.descript: The combat armor helmet is the corresponding armor piece to the combat armor set. This model displays what is possibly a headlamp, attached to the left side above the brow line.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Armor_Helmet.label: Modular Combat Armor Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Helmet.description: A matching helmet for the combat armor, it offers a bit of protection.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Combat_Helmet.label: Combat Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger_Gas_Mask.descript: A gas mask to go with the gas ranger outfit.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gas_Ranger_Gas_Mask.label: Ranger Gas Mask
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gasmask_Goggles.description: A simple gas mask that covers the entire face, often seen worn by raiders. It is held on to the wearer by adjustable straps. It's not very protective against bullets and other physical attacks but provides medium protection against toxins and radiation.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Gasmask_Goggles.label: Gas Mask with Goggles
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiations_Suit_Helmet.descr: A helmet designed to protect the wearer from radiation exposure. Part of the radiation suit set.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Radiations_Suit_Helmet.label: Radiation Suit Helmet
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Reinforced_Combat_Armor_Helm: The helmet is a ballistic assembly, designed to protect the wearer from projectile, bladed weapons, and blunt trauma. An integrated polarized visor protects the user's eyes from the ordinary battlefield hazards of grit and dust.

The helmet is a ballistic assembly, designed to protect the wearer from projectile, bladed weapons, and blunt trauma. An integrated polarized visor protects the user's eyes from the ordinary battlefield hazards of grit and dust. It is similar in appearance to the helmet used with the reinforced suit but is a different color.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Rivet_City_Security_Helmet.d: A helmet worn by the security forces of Rivet City.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Hat.description: Part of the sheriff duster outfit. it gives a little buff to perception.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Sheriff_Hat.label: Sheriff Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Bandana.description: A bandana tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Bandana.label: Slave Bandana
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rag_Hood.description: A scarf used to create a hood, tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Rag_Hood.label: Slave Rag Hood
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Scarf_Hat.description: A scarf used to create a hat, tipically worn by slaves.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Slave_Scarf_Hat.label: Slave Scarf Hat
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wrapped_Cap.description: A simple cap made of wrapped cloth, commonly worn by wastelanders for sun protection. Lightweight and provides basic protection from the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_Wrapped_Cap.label: Wrapped Cap
